wiki.summary: “PIXELATED KISSES” is the first release from Joji since his third studio album SMITHEREENS back in late 2022 and is the first single off his fourth studio album, Piss In The Wind. The track first became available for pre-save through Joji’s website on October 13, 2025. Later that same day, Joji would make posts to social media with pictures of billboards saying: “see you tomorrow" On October 14, 2025, the song was released alongside an accompanying visualizer. Read more on Last.fm.
